task_completion.description: Navigate to the calendar and locate the date 3 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar app is open and the view is set to the date exactly 3 days from the current date.

task_completion.description: Identify the two 'Vendor Evaluation' events on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two separate event blocks titled 'Vendor Evaluation' are visible on the calendar for the target date around 11:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Open the event details to check the attendee list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event details modal or form view is open for 'Vendor Evaluation', showing either the attendees (Alice Johnson, Bob Williams) or an empty attendee list.

task_completion.description: Delete the duplicate 'Vendor Evaluation' event that has no attendees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Delete' button on the event modal/form for the 'Vendor Evaluation' event that has zero attendees, or a deletion confirmation dialog is shown and accepted.

task_completion.description: Ensure the valid event with attendees remains in the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view shows exactly one 'Vendor Evaluation' event remaining on the target date, and/or the remaining event's details are shown containing Alice Johnson and Bob Williams as attendees.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo Calendar GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and navigation within the Odoo web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to delete the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, psql prompts, or python scripts are visible being used to execute SQL DELETE commands.

integrity.description: The deletion was performed using the application's built-in delete functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Odoo 'Delete' button and confirmation prompts are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target event name is 'Vendor Evaluation'. The valid event has attendees 'Alice Johnson' and 'Bob Williams'. The duplicate 'ghost' event has no attendees. Both are scheduled for 3 days from the task start time at 11:00 AM in the Odoo calendar.
